item.title: Images of Note: Greem
item.description:
The Gnostic Christians were right though, we need to fight God. We have rockets and shit so we don't need to build a Tur ach feumaidh sinn NASA no Spacex agus airgead gu....fuirich mionaid.
Oh boy wait until you find out where the Beatles came from.
"Saving" Free speech by banning people from talking freely about certain things considered "woke" sure is a thing that's happening on Twitter.
Mood
This, shit like this is what Tumblr is for.
Go listen to Three Cheers for Sweet Revenge, even the Interlude is a fucking banger.
(pls halp)
MIKU WHAT HAVE YOU DONE
It's over guise
Yeah fuck Twitter
Glasgow is a good place.
it's because it's easier to convince men to vote away women's rights than men to vote away their own.
ngl she looks like she's taken so many drugs
a creetchur
Men are like "lol short manlet lol" when Dwarves from Lord of the Rings are all sub five foot and are fucking badasses. Be a fucking Dwarf, dig that fucking hole.
"...wait..."
Rocky Horror is a fucking wild film and everyone should watch it at least once.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Comet incoming. 49 things for viewing.
item.description: #8 edit: I recently learned that a disturbing number of youth have such an imbalance between sex education and exposure to hardcore porn that they think this is standard. I assume that all of us are adults here and know that obviously it's not what the meme implies, but I feel obligated to make sure that everybody knows that of course, not all women feel this way. This is not an expectation upon men to act that way. Please always make sure that you and your partner are on the same page and do not ever try to do anything without consent and communication. Also I think it's kind of gross that it says girls instead of women. I'm probably not going to be posting that one in the future. Support sex education. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: The Legendary John Wojtowicz
item.description: Mugshot of John Wojtowicz, who along with Salvatore Naturile and Robert Westenberg, unsuccessfully tried to rob a bank in 1972 to pay for his wife Eden's gender reassignment surgery. Apparently, Wojtowicz had based his plans on the movie, "The Godfather" (1972), which he had watched earlier that day. 2,000 onlookers, FBI, roof-top snipers, TV crew, and police all gathered at the Chase Manhattan bank in Gravesend, Brooklyn on a hot summer night. Wojtowicz held 7 hostages for 14 hours during which time he demanded food for the hostages, paid the pizza delivery boy wads of cash, threw money at the outside onlookers, shot through the bank's exit rear door (fearing the police would storm it), and accidentally fired a shot after dropping his rifle on the floor. In the end, his robbery attempt failed, and he was arrested and sentenced to 20 years in prison, of which he served five. Wojtowicz's story was later turned into a movie called "Dog Day Afternoon" (1975), starring Al Pacino and John Cazale, both of whom, interestingly enough, had starred in "The Godfather." For the rights to his story, Wojtowicz was paid $7,500 and 1% of the movie's net profits, which he gave to Eden. After her operation, Eden married someone else before dying of AIDS-related pneumonia in 1987. Wojtowicz attended her funeral and delivered a eulogy. John died on January 2, 2006, at the age of 60.

item.dc:creator: trinxter

item.title: I love Tim Walz
item.description: TLDR: trump is a piece of shit and ruined my family, hope he croaks sooner than later. I’ll never forgive what Trump and the GOP did to my family. Before 10 years ago, they were actually capable of having a conversation, they were kind and caring, maybe they had some questionable opinions on certain things but I never heard any of them talk about politics my entire life, and even those questionable opinions were nowhere near as extreme as they are now and they always kept it to themselves, minded their own business, and didn’t care what others did or didn’t do. None of that is true anymore, they’ve been warped and radicalized into their worst selves and then brainwashed to be even more extreme than that! I think the one that saddens me the most is my grandfather. He was a man that I used to look up to my entire life, he was such a kind man, would help anyone out, give homeless people food, volunteer at soup kitchens, was always donating to charity, and he was so full of wisdom. You know in shows and movies there’s always that character that gives out the most profound wisdom and advice? That was my grandfather. He immigrated here from Canada after being orphaned at a very young age during world war 2. He started his own business here, was very successful, and was able to retire early after selling his business. Because of trump, he is nothing close to the man he used to be. My entire life I never heard a racist word out of his mouth, instead he was always teaching us to be kind to those who may look different because we’re not different at all, we’re all human beings trying to make our way in the world. I credit my own stances to the way I was raised by my family and my grandfather. Because of the way they raised me, I’m as liberal and as empathetic as they come. So it just saddens me more than words can describe to grow up with these people and learning from them and striving to one day be HALF the man my grandfather is, or was, only to see them fall victim to brainwashing and watch them in real time become the most hateful, racist, extremist, bigots, I’ve ever met. I hate what trump did to the people I loved. He destroyed my family, I won’t talk to most of them anymore. I will celebrate the day he dies every single year til it’s my time to go. Make thanksgiving fun again. Or as I like to pronounce it “Emtifa”
item.dc:creator: capnadorable

item.title: I've lost her, my mom last month, my sister and dad years ago. Nothing hurt worse than having Snooks put to sleep.
item.description: I'm finally able to talk about it in the past tense some. The worst thing now is being in my apartment without her, so I'm getting drunk and tomorrow morning I will get the fuck out of here as early as possible and go do whatever. I hung out with friends again today. That enabled me keep my fucking sanity. Nothing in my entire life has been more painful than sending Snooks over the rainbow bridge. If you had heard me yesterday at about 1 pm or so when the vet called to say I "could come pick up my baby" you would have thought I had lost my entire fucking family all at once. And it has always taken a lot for me to cry. I'm able to listen to music now for the first time since. Anything even slightly sad sounding, I had to turn the radio off FAST. I'm listening to Bach's fugue in g minor, BWV 542. Bach is my jam, my jelly, my peanut butter and my peanuts. When this horrid shit happens to you, and it will, I'm sorry to say, if you live alone like me, DO NOT JUST STAY AT HOME BY YOURSELF. GET THE FUCK OUT AND GO WHERE THERE ARE PEOPLE. If you've got wonderful friends, and I'm sure you do, go hang out with them. They'll make time for you. We all have to go through this fucking horseshit more than once and it fucking sucks every Goddamned time. I wept today a couple times. My best buddy, with whom I hung out today at a soccer game (I don't give a shit about soccer but I needed the company) lost his pet doggo several months ago to a car. He said carrying his dog back from the roadside he nearly collapsed from the grief. I was right there for him. I had no idea how bad it hurts until now.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Hearty Crock Pot Cowboy Soup
item.description: Hearty Crock Pot Cowboy Soup Ingredients 2 Lbs Ground beef 4 Yukon Gold Potatoes 2 Cans Mixed vegetables undrained 1 Can Sweet corn undrained 1 Can Condensed tomato soup 1 Can diced tomatoes 1 Can Cut green beans undrained Pinch Salt Dash Pepper 2 Tablespoons Sugar Instructions Peel potatoes and cut into small cubes. Brown and drain ground beef. Place beef and potatoes in large slow cooker. Add all cans of vegetables, can of tomato soup, and diced tomatoes. Salt and pepper to taste. Finally, add the secret ingredient that sets this apart from your average soup- sugar!! Mix together well and cook on low for 2-3 hours in slow cooker. Recipe Notes Of course you can substitute fresh or frozen veggies, but would need to add a can or two of beef stock to this. No need to add this if using canned veggies, as you will be adding the cans undrained-which provides both liquid and flavor. https://blessthismeal.com/hearty-and-easy-crockpot-cowboy-soup-recipe/
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: A basket full of deplorables.
item.description: A grammar explanation for those who are complaining. “Republicans work harder to keep tampons out of school restrooms than (they work harder to keep) guns (out of school restrooms). It does work this way. Don’t be pedantic. You know what it means. Comment on the intent not the grammar, please.
